_meta.purpose: Captures the Magento spConfig matrix for ONE Tecimer chain product so Part-2 Claude Code can reuse the same extraction script on all ~270 products. Run /scripts/scrape-tecimer-details.ts to iterate every URL in tecimer-chains-raw.json and produce the full variant matrix.
_meta.extractionRecipe: On a logged-in product page, run: `jQuery('#product_addtocart_form').data('mage-configurable').options.spConfig` — returns the full variant matrix below.

fields.attributes: attrId -> { code: gf_metal_type | dimensions, options: [{id, label, allowedProducts}] }
fields.index: childId -> { attrId: optionId } — tells you what variant a childId represents
fields.optionPrices: childId -> { finalPrice: { amount: NNN } } — Tecimer's wholesale estimated price in CAD

weightPerInchObservation: Weight per inch is consistent within a karat (≈1.92 g/in for N209 18k Flat Beveled Curb 4mm). This means: Part-2 can store ONE `weightPerInchG` value per chain model, and length variations are pure linear scaling. Cross-check by computing wholesale spot-equivalent — if Tecimer uses ~$138/g 18k wholesale (which matches today's spot), our derived weights are reliable.
